name: FrootAI Plugin Marketplace
description: Registry of all FrootAI plugins — themed bundles of agents, instructions, skills, and hooks.

plugins.name: agentic-rag
plugins.description: Autonomous RAG where the AI agent controls retrieval — decides when to search, which sources to query, iterates on results, and synthesizes across multiple knowledge bases with citations.
plugins.author: FrootAI Contributors

plugins.name: ai-evaluation-suite
plugins.description: AI Evaluation Suite — groundedness, coherence, relevance, fluency, and safety scoring. Build evaluation pipelines with Azure AI Evaluation SDK, custom metrics, regression tracking, and CI/CD integration.
plugins.author: FrootAI Contributors

plugins.name: ai-landing-zone
plugins.description: Azure AI Landing Zone — subscription vending, network topology, RBAC, policy enforcement, and hub-spoke architecture for enterprise AI workloads. Includes Bicep IaC modules validated against all 6 WAF pillars.
plugins.author: FrootAI Contributors

plugins.name: ai-landing-zone-advanced
plugins.description: Advanced AI Landing Zone — multi-region deployment, private endpoints, Azure Firewall, DDoS protection, sovereign cloud patterns, and compliance-ready infrastructure for regulated industries.
plugins.author: FrootAI Contributors

plugins.name: ai-observability
plugins.description: AI Observability — distributed tracing for LLM calls, token usage dashboards, latency monitoring, evaluation score tracking, and alerting. Build full observability for AI workloads with Azure Monitor and OpenTelemetry.
plugins.author: FrootAI Contributors

plugins.name: ai-search-portal
plugins.description: AI Search Portal — full-text and vector hybrid search with semantic ranking, faceted navigation, autocomplete, and personalized results. Build a production search experience on Azure AI Search with RAG integration.
plugins.author: FrootAI Contributors

plugins.name: anomaly-detection
plugins.description: Anomaly Detection — real-time and batch anomaly detection for time-series, metrics, and log data. Uses Azure AI Anomaly Detector, custom ML models, and event-driven alerting with Azure Event Hubs.
plugins.author: FrootAI Contributors

plugins.name: architecture-patterns
plugins.description: Architecture Patterns — cloud design patterns, domain-driven design, microservices, event sourcing, CQRS, and hexagonal architecture. Generate architecture blueprints, C4 diagrams, and ADRs.
plugins.author: FrootAI Contributors

plugins.name: azure-ai-services
plugins.description: Azure AI Services — OpenAI, AI Search, Document Intelligence, Language, Speech, Vision, and Content Safety integration patterns. Production-ready wrappers with retry, circuit breaker, and cost tracking.
plugins.author: FrootAI Contributors

plugins.name: azure-containers
plugins.description: Azure Containers — AKS, Container Apps, Container Registry, and Dockerized deployment patterns. GPU workloads, KEDA autoscaling, Dapr sidecar integration, and multi-arch builds for AI model serving.
plugins.author: FrootAI Contributors

plugins.name: azure-data-services
plugins.description: Azure Data Services — Cosmos DB, SQL Database, Blob Storage, Data Explorer, and Redis Cache patterns. Schema design, partition strategies, query optimization, and data lifecycle management.
plugins.author: FrootAI Contributors

plugins.name: azure-identity-security
plugins.description: Azure Identity & Security — Managed Identity, Key Vault, RBAC, Conditional Access, and zero-trust architecture. Secure AI workloads with certificate-based auth, secret rotation, and compliance auditing.
plugins.author: FrootAI Contributors

plugins.name: azure-infrastructure
plugins.description: Azure Infrastructure — landing zones, hub-spoke networking, private endpoints, Azure Policy, RBAC, and subscription vending. Enterprise-grade Bicep IaC for AI workloads validated against all 6 WAF pillars.
plugins.author: FrootAI Contributors

plugins.name: azure-messaging
plugins.description: Azure Messaging — Service Bus, Event Hubs, and Event Grid patterns for async communication, event sourcing, and CQRS. Build reliable message-driven architectures with dead-letter handling and partitioning.
plugins.author: FrootAI Contributors

plugins.name: azure-monitoring
plugins.description: Azure Monitoring — Application Insights, Log Analytics, KQL queries, alert rules, workbooks, and dashboards. Full observability for AI workloads with custom metrics, distributed tracing, and SLO tracking.
plugins.author: FrootAI Contributors

plugins.name: azure-serverless
plugins.description: Azure Serverless — Functions, Logic Apps, Event Grid, and Durable Functions patterns. Event-driven architectures with consumption-based scaling, cold start mitigation, and cost optimization.
plugins.author: FrootAI Contributors

plugins.name: browser-automation
plugins.description: AI-driven web task execution using Playwright MCP and GPT-4o Vision — navigate websites, extract data, fill forms, and automate multi-step web workflows from natural language.
plugins.author: FrootAI Contributors

plugins.name: call-center-voice-ai
plugins.description: Call Center Voice AI — real-time speech-to-text, intent classification, sentiment analysis, and AI-assisted agent coaching. Integrates Azure AI Speech, Azure Communication Services, and GPT-4o for voice-driven customer service.
plugins.author: FrootAI Contributors

plugins.name: cicd-automation
plugins.description: CI/CD Automation — GitHub Actions, Azure DevOps pipelines, build matrices, deployment gates, and release management. Automate test → build → deploy → evaluate pipelines for AI workloads.
plugins.author: FrootAI Contributors

plugins.name: code-quality
plugins.description: Code Quality — automated code review, refactoring suggestions, dead code removal, complexity analysis, and technical debt tracking. AI-powered quality gates with custom rulesets and team coding standards.
plugins.author: FrootAI Contributors

plugins.name: content-moderation
plugins.description: Content Moderation — real-time text, image, and multi-modal content safety with Azure AI Content Safety. Includes severity scoring, blocklist management, custom categories, and human-in-the-loop review workflows.
plugins.author: FrootAI Contributors

plugins.name: content-safety-toolkit
plugins.description: Content Safety Toolkit — Azure AI Content Safety integration, custom blocklists, severity thresholds, image moderation, prompt injection detection, and jailbreak defense patterns for production AI.
plugins.author: FrootAI Contributors

plugins.name: context-engineering
plugins.description: Context Engineering — maximize AI effectiveness with structured context, memory banks, knowledge wiring, and smart prompt assembly. Build context-aware agents that retrieve the right information at the right time.
plugins.author: FrootAI Contributors

plugins.name: copilot-studio-bot
plugins.description: Copilot Studio Bot — custom copilot experiences with Microsoft Copilot Studio, Power Virtual Agents, and Teams integration. Build conversational AI with enterprise SSO, Dataverse, and multi-channel deployment.
plugins.author: FrootAI Contributors

plugins.name: copilot-teams-extension
plugins.description: Copilot for Teams Extension — declarative agents, API plugins, message extensions, and adaptive cards for Microsoft 365 Copilot. Build custom AI experiences that surface inside Teams, Outlook, and M365 apps.
plugins.author: FrootAI Contributors

plugins.name: cost-optimized-ai-gateway
plugins.description: Cost-Optimized AI Gateway — intelligent model routing, token budget enforcement, request caching, rate limiting, and usage analytics. Route between GPT-4o, GPT-4o-mini, and Phi models based on complexity and cost.
plugins.author: FrootAI Contributors

plugins.name: csharp-dotnet-development
plugins.description: C# .NET Development — ASP.NET Core, Minimal API, Blazor, MAUI, EF Core, xUnit/NUnit testing, and architecture patterns. Full-stack .NET with WAF-aligned coding standards and code review agents.
plugins.author: FrootAI Contributors

plugins.name: csharp-mcp-development
plugins.description: C# MCP Development — build Model Context Protocol servers in C# with .NET SDK, ASP.NET Core hosting, dependency injection, and Azure deployment patterns.
plugins.author: FrootAI Contributors

plugins.name: database-management
plugins.description: Database administration and optimization — PostgreSQL, SQL Server, Cosmos DB modeling, query optimization, migration planning, and data pipeline patterns.
plugins.author: FrootAI Contributors

plugins.name: design-system
plugins.description: Design System — UI components, design tokens, theming, responsive layouts, accessibility, animations, and form patterns. Build consistent, accessible UIs with AI-generated component variants and Storybook docs.
plugins.author: FrootAI Contributors

plugins.name: deterministic-agent
plugins.description: Deterministic AI Agent — finite state machines, rule-based routing, guardrailed tool use, and reproducible conversation flows. Build agents that produce consistent outputs regardless of LLM temperature.

plugins.name: devops-oncall
plugins.description: DevOps and on-call operations — incident triage, Azure resource diagnostics, KQL query generation, deployment automation, and SRE patterns for AI workloads.

plugins.name: docker-containerization
plugins.description: Docker Containerization — multi-stage builds, distroless images, BuildKit caching, health checks, and security scanning. Containerize any workload with optimized images for AI inference and web services.

plugins.name: document-intelligence
plugins.description: Document Intelligence — OCR, form extraction, table recognition, and intelligent document processing. Uses Azure AI Document Intelligence with custom models for invoices, receipts, contracts, and domain-specific forms.
plugins.author: FrootAI Contributors

plugins.name: edge-ai-phi4
plugins.description: Edge AI with Phi-4 — deploy small language models on edge devices, IoT hubs, and local inference servers. Quantization, ONNX optimization, and offline-capable AI with Microsoft Phi-4 models.

plugins.name: enterprise-rag
plugins.description: Production-grade Retrieval-Augmented Generation pipeline with Azure AI Search, OpenAI embeddings, Container Apps deployment, and WAF-aligned evaluation. Includes the RAG Architect agent, Python + Bicep instructions, play initializer skill, and all 3 security hooks.
plugins.author: FrootAI Contributors

plugins.name: fai-protocol-starter
plugins.description: FAI Protocol Starter — quickstart for the FAI Protocol ecosystem. Scaffold fai-manifest.json, fai-context.json, and connect primitives into wired solution plays. The entry point for building FAI Protocol compliant solutions.
plugins.author: FrootAI Contributors

plugins.name: fine-tuning-mlops
plugins.description: Fine-Tuning & MLOps — dataset curation, model training, hyperparameter optimization, model registry, and deployment pipelines. End-to-end ML lifecycle with Azure AI Foundry, MLflow, and evaluation gates.

plugins.name: fine-tuning-workflow
plugins.description: Fine-Tuning Workflow — dataset preparation, training job orchestration, evaluation pipelines, model registry, and deployment automation. Fine-tune GPT, Phi, and open-source models on Azure AI Foundry.

plugins.description: Frontend Web Development — React, Angular, Vue, Svelte, Astro, and Tailwind CSS patterns. Component architecture, state management, accessibility, and performance optimization for modern web apps.

plugins.name: frootai-discovery
plugins.description: FrootAI Discovery — meta-plugin for exploring and recommending agents, instructions, skills, hooks, and plugins. Suggests the right primitives for your task based on project context and WAF alignment.

plugins.name: frootai-essentials
plugins.description: The essential FrootAI toolkit — WAF-aligned agents (security reviewer, cost optimizer, architect), cross-cutting instructions (OWASP, agent-safety, testing), and security hooks (secrets scanner, tool guardian, governance audit). The recommended starting plugin for every FrootAI project.
plugins.author: FrootAI Contributors
